---
title: "Skill Gap Analysis"
ormat:
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
    code-overflow: wrap
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: false
---

<!-- ```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
import pandas as pd

skills_data = {
    "Name": ["Jessica, Jacky"],
    "Python": [4, 3],
    "SQL": [4, 3],
    "Machine Learning": [3, 2],
    "Cloud Computing": [2, 3]
}

df_skills = pd.DataFrame(skills_data)
df_skills.set_index("Name", inplace=True)
df_skills
``` -->
